title: Build matter creation and management dashboard
description: Implement the matter list dashboard page and matter creation form. Include matter detail page shell with tabs for Overview, Documents, Tasks, and Chat. Enforce matter-level RBAC on all server actions.

acceptance_criteria.text: Dashboard lists all matters the authenticated user is a member of
Create matter form captures name, type, client name, and status
Matter detail page has Overview, Documents, Tasks, Chat tabs
Server action to create a matter automatically adds creator as attorney member
Non-members cannot access a matter's detail page (403 response)

steps: Create app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx — matter list with status badges
Create app/(dashboard)/matters/[id]/page.tsx — matter detail shell with tabs
Implement createMatter, updateMatter, archiveMatter server actions
Add RBAC helper: assertMatterMember(userId, matterId, minRole)
Wire up empty states and loading skeletons
risks: Tab routing — use URL search params vs nested routes decision needed upfront
